command_summary: codex exec in a read-only sandbox with the source design-craft skill and output-last-message artifact

style_authority.note: Kept the high-frequency calm operations context and removed decorative whole-sheet motion.

reference_selection.note: Used motion quality, interaction physics, design moves, and validation evidence boundaries.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Questioned each motion and preserved only causal direct-manipulation feedback.

evidence_level.note: Labeled the run L0 static-source only and did not claim runtime smoothness.

verified_boundary.note: Separated code-visible defects from unverified frame cost, touch feel, and device behavior.

design_moves.note: Specified pointer capture, grab offset, transform tracking, interruption, velocity handoff, projection, resistance, and Reduced Motion.

scope_control.note: Stayed within the sheet interaction and its browser/device validation plan.
